questions.scenario: Tank is at 25% HP. Essential Dignity has 2 charges available.
questions.question: How effective will Essential Dignity be?
options: Increased potency due to low HP
questions.explanation: Essential Dignity heals MORE when the target is at low HP. At 25%, it's at maximum potency. This makes it ideal for emergency situations.

questions.scenario: Combat is starting. Tank is at full HP.
questions.question: What should you apply first?
questions.explanation: AST is a regen healer - start with Aspected Benefic (HoT) on the tank. The HoT heals incoming damage over time, letting you DPS.

questions.scenario: Tank at 15% HP. Essential Dignity on CD.
questions.question: What's your emergency option?
questions.explanation: Celestial Intersection is an oGCD that provides shield and HoT instantly. When Essential Dignity is down, it's your best emergency oGCD.

questions.scenario: Tank at 70% HP. You have 2 Essential Dignity charges.
questions.question: Should you use Essential Dignity?
questions.explanation: At 70% HP, Essential Dignity's potency is lower. Wait until tank is lower to maximize its healing value.

questions.scenario: Aspected Benefic has 10s remaining. Tank at 85% HP.
questions.question: Should you refresh it?
questions.explanation: At 85% with 10s of HoT remaining, refreshing would overheal. Let it tick down - refresh when it's needed AND about to fall off.

questions.scenario: Draw just came off CD. You have no card.
questions.question: When should you Draw?
questions.explanation: Draw on cooldown. Cards have limited duration, and the sooner you Draw, the sooner you can Draw again.

questions.scenario: You have a card. Party has 2 melee and 2 ranged DPS.
questions.question: Who should receive the card?
questions.explanation: Cards give damage buffs. Play them on the DPS who will get the most value - usually whoever is performing best.

questions.scenario: You have a card but all DPS are dead.
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: Minor Arcana converts your card to Lord/Lady of Crowns. If you can't use the card optimally, convert it rather than waste it.

questions.scenario: Draw is ready during heavy healing phase.
questions.question: Should you Draw?
questions.explanation: Draw is an oGCD - weave it between heals. Even during intense healing, keep the card cycle rolling.

questions.scenario: A DPS will burst in 5 seconds. You have a card.
questions.question: When should you play the card?
questions.explanation: Play just before burst so the buff is active during their highest damage. Playing during or after wastes buff duration.

questions.scenario: Fight started. DPS using openers. Divination available.
questions.question: When should you use Divination?
questions.explanation: Divination (6% party buff) should align with party burst. Openers are the biggest burst - use it early.

questions.scenario: You just used Divination. Oracle is available.
questions.question: What should you do with Oracle?
questions.explanation: Oracle is granted after Divination and is strong damage. Use it during the burst window you created.

questions.scenario: You've played 2 cards. Need 3 for Astrodyne.
questions.question: What should you prioritize?
questions.explanation: Getting Astrodyne active is valuable. Play your third card even if target isn't perfect.

questions.scenario: Divination ready. Major burst in 45s. Small burst now.
questions.question: When to use Divination?
questions.explanation: Depends on fight length. If Divination will be ready for major burst, use now. If not, save it. Learn fight timings.

questions.scenario: Played 3 cards with same seal. Astrodyne activates.
questions.question: What buffs do you receive?
questions.explanation: Astrodyne buffs depend on seal variety. Three same = 1 buff. You want different seals for more buffs.

questions.scenario: Tank has no HoT. 75% HP, steady damage.
questions.question: What should you apply?
questions.explanation: The HoT from Aspected Benefic handles steady damage over time, letting you DPS. Save oGCDs for bigger drops.

questions.scenario: Raidwide hit. Party at 60%. Celestial Opposition available.
questions.question: Should you use it?
questions.explanation: Celestial Opposition is a free oGCD party heal + HoT. At 60%, it handles recovery without using a GCD.

questions.scenario: Heavy tank damage phase. Synastry available.
questions.question: How to use Synastry?
questions.explanation: Synastry duplicates 40% of your heals to the linked target. Apply to tank during heavy damage.

questions.scenario: Multiple raidwides in 20s. Party at full HP.
questions.question: Pre-apply Aspected Helios?
questions.explanation: Pre-applied HoT means party recovers automatically between hits. Proactive HoTs are AST's strength.

questions.scenario: C.Opposition ready. Raidwide in 30s. Need healing now.
questions.question: Should you use it?
questions.explanation: 60s cooldown means it'll be ready again for the raidwide. Don't hold oGCDs unnecessarily.

questions.scenario: Raidwide in 12 seconds. Star available.
questions.question: When to place Earthly Star?
questions.explanation: Star takes 10s to mature. Place NOW so it's at full power when the raidwide hits in 12 seconds.

questions.scenario: Star placed 5s ago. Need healing now.
questions.question: Should you detonate early?
questions.explanation: At 5s, Star is half power. Use other heals if possible. Only detonate early if absolutely necessary.

questions.scenario: Party will stack in 15 seconds for a mechanic.
questions.question: Where to place Star?
questions.explanation: Place where party WILL BE when you detonate. Stack point means mature Star hits everyone.

questions.scenario: Star out for 18s. Auto-detonates at 20s.
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: At 18s, Star is mature. Let it auto-detonate unless you need healing immediately or party is moving.

questions.scenario: Fight started. No raidwide for 30s.
questions.question: Should you place Star?
questions.explanation: Star deals damage too. Use for DPS value. 60s CD means it's ready for the 30s raidwide anyway.

questions.scenario: Heavy raidwide coming. Party full HP.
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: Neutral Sect adds shields to Aspected spells. Pre-raidwide, use both for HoT + shield combo.

questions.scenario: Heavy damage in next 5 seconds. Macrocosmos available.
questions.question: When to use Macrocosmos?
questions.explanation: Macrocosmos stores damage taken. Apply BEFORE damage so it captures it, then detonate to heal back.

questions.scenario: Tankbuster in 5 seconds. Exaltation available.
questions.question: Should you use Exaltation?
questions.explanation: Exaltation provides 10% mitigation AND heals when it expires. Apply before for mitigation value.

questions.scenario: Heavy sustained party damage. C.Unconscious available.
questions.question: How does it work?
questions.explanation: Collective Unconscious is channeled - provides mitigation while channeling and applies a HoT.

questions.scenario: Need to move but also keep casting.
questions.question: What ability helps?
questions.explanation: Lightspeed makes GCDs instant for 15s. Full mobility while maintaining your rotation.

questions.scenario: Combust has 4s remaining.
questions.question: Should you refresh?
questions.explanation: Refresh at 3s or less to avoid clipping. At 4s, wait one more GCD.

questions.scenario: Party healthy. Combust up. Cards played. No mechanics.
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: Fall Malefic is your filler. When healing isn't needed and DoT is up, spam Malefic for damage.

questions.scenario: SGE co-healer uses Kerachole before raidwide.
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: Kerachole provides mitigation and HoT. Trust your co-healer and focus on DPS.

questions.scenario: DPS died. Swiftcast ready. WHM co-healer is casting Glare.
questions.question: Who should raise?
questions.explanation: Your Swiftcast is ready and WHM is DPSing. Take the raise immediately.

questions.scenario: Party member has Doom (white bar).
questions.question: What should you do?
questions.explanation: Doom with white bar is cleansable. If not cleansed, player dies. Esuna is top priority.
